# CentProof

> CentProof is a local-first macOS application for importing PDF bank
> and credit-card statements, reconciling balances to the cent, and
> searching financial history with on-device AI.  Statements, ledger,
> AI prompts, and exports never leave the user's Mac — there is no
> cloud sync and the app never asks for bank credentials.

CentProof is built and sold by Java Mantra Corp.  It is distributed
as a signed, Apple-notarised macOS .dmg downloaded directly from
centproof.com (no App Store).  Requires macOS 13 Ventura or later
on Apple Silicon (M1, M2, M3, or M4).  Intel Macs and Windows are
not supported.

Pricing (USD): Free Test Mode for trial imports; Pro Lifetime $49
one-time (3 Macs, 12 months of feature updates included); Pro
Monthly $5/mo (1 Mac, cancel anytime).  A launch-window coupon
drops Lifetime to $30 for the first ~30 days after public launch.
Purchase + license keys are handled by LemonSqueezy as merchant of
record, with a 30-day no-questions refund policy.

## Product

- [Product overview](https://centproof.com/product): the feature
  tour — statement import, ledger, reconciliation, search, Ask
  CentProof local AI, exports.
- [Download](https://centproof.com/download): direct .dmg with
  system requirements and a step-by-step install flow.
- [Security](https://centproof.com/security): Apple Developer ID
  signing, Apple notarisation, SHA-256 publication, the full list
  of network calls the app makes, and commands users can run to
  verify the .dmg themselves before installing.
- [Privacy](https://centproof.com/privacy): the plain-English
  privacy summary — what stays local, what (if anything) leaves
  the device, and what third parties are involved (payment +
  release hosting only).
- [Banks](https://centproof.com/banks): list of US bank and
  credit-card PDF formats currently parsed without manual mapping.

## Pricing and support

- [Pricing](https://centproof.com/pricing): the three plans
  side-by-side with refund + multi-Mac terms.
- [FAQ](https://centproof.com/faq): direct answers about
  distribution, license keys, local AI, exports, refunds, and
  explicit non-goals.
- [Support](https://centproof.com/support): support@centproof.com
  contact and a form for requesting bank-PDF coverage.
- [Changelog](https://centproof.com/changelog): release history,
  mirrored from the open CHANGELOG.md in the releases repository.

## Guides

- [Anatomy of a bank PDF statement](https://centproof.com/guides/anatomy-of-a-bank-pdf-statement):
  walk-through of the seven standard sections of a US bank
  statement (header, account summary, deposits, withdrawals,
  fees/interest, daily balance, account-specific extras) and what
  CentProof reconciliation checks in each section.

## Optional

- [Legal — Privacy Policy](https://centproof.com/legal/privacy-policy)
- [Legal — Terms of Service](https://centproof.com/legal/terms)
- [Legal — Refund Policy](https://centproof.com/legal/refund-policy)
- [Java Mantra Corp](https://javamantra.com): publisher / developer.
